title: Daoist Canon: Lingbao Wufu Xu (Section 4)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Lingbao Wufu Xu
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Lingbao Wufu Xu

translation.text: From the Lingbao Wufu Xu of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
